The '''De'nel system''' was a [[star system]] in the [[Brak sector]] of the [[Expansion Region]]<ref name="Appendix" /> where [[viper probe droid]]s were deployed during [[Project Swarm]].<ref name="Odyssey">''[[The Odyssey of Star Wars: An Epic Poem]]''</ref>

{{System-stub}}
